items.description: Judge says that long sentence is merited for slaying of state Democratic lawmaker Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark.

items.title: West Asia war LIVE: International benchmark oil prices cross $100 per barrel
items.description: Houthis strike tankers in Red Sea; first since Saudi-linked shipping blockade via Bab el-Mandeb

items.title: MSF says health workers in DR Congo are struggling to prevent Ebola spread
items.description: It says the response is 'not enough' and the outbreak will follow a dangerous trajectory if more is not done to stop the spread.

items.title: Germany records rise in sexual violence against children
items.description: Reported cases of child sexual abuse in Germany climbed to more than 17,000 last year, marking an increase from previous years, authorities say.
